description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gcc Docker image. Include a before_script that runs mkdir build, cd build, mkdir client, and cd client to set up the build directory. Add a build job (default stage) that executes cmake ../../client followed by make, and configure it to upload all untracked files as an artifact named $CI_JOB_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. No caches, services, or special rules are defined.
